ticket_goal: Graceful Error Handling & Global Error Boundary

Gemini CLI.findings: Fetched issue details. Ticket involves global error handling and boundaries.

TECHNICAL SPECS.synthesis: Implement a hierarchical error handling strategy: 1) Global Boundary, 2) Granular Boundaries, 3) Standardized Error Response Utility.

fixes_applied: Implemented standardized API error response utility in src/lib/errors.ts.
Refactor error.tsx and global-error.tsx to use the new UI component.
Added Playwright E2E test for error handling.
Fixed E2E test failure by creating a dedicated /test-error route that throws during render.
Resolved strict mode violation in Playwright by scoping locators to the ErrorBoundary UI component.
Implemented Visual Audit Protocol; generated screenshots in verification/ folder.
Verified 'Retry' logic and error message display.
Updated ARCHITECTURE.md with Hierarchical Error Handling Strategy.
Fixed build failure in src/app/test-error/page.tsx by moving throw to useEffect (prerender-safe).

expected_output.docs_accuracy: Documentation matches current implementation and aesthetic standards.
